owner_request: Add flat public.taxonomy_tags import table for the 500+ cross-hub taxonomy and record the work in build_tracker.md.

notes: Created public.taxonomy_tags on the linked Supabase project via temporary admin-only helper

commands_run.command: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=... supabase gen types typescript --project-id rumdmulxzmjtsplsjngi --schema public > src/lib/database.types.ts

notes: existing warning: several chunks exceed 600 kB after minification

manual_follow_up: WO-TAXONOMY-02 and WO-TAXONOMY-03 remain local READY FOR REVIEW items; their DB/edge deploy path is still separate from this applied core taxonomy import.
notes: The earlier namespace-based draft was replaced with the simpler flat taxonomy_tags model requested by the owner.

The helper was deleted after the live apply and migration-history repair completed.
